response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack and some geospatial background (GISCollective), but the resume shows almost no modern C++ work (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015) and no Rust experience. The role centers on modern C++/Rust routing-tile pipelines and navigation guidance, which are not reflected in recent experience. DLang and Node.js dominate the recent stack, and there is no evidence of navigation systems or production routing data pipeline work.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain exposure via GISCollective and Green Map
Senior-level experience with distributed, high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, open-source contributions
concerns: No recent modern C++ experience and no Rust experience
No navigation guidance or routing-tile pipeline background
Recent stack is TypeScript/Node-centric, far from the role's systems-level focus
